name: Classic Veg Burger

description: A crunchy fried chicken patty served with lettuce, mayo, and fresh buns.

name: Spicy Chicken Burger
description: A bold chicken burger with spicy seasoning, onions, lettuce, and tangy sauce.

name: Double Cheese Burger
description: Two layers of cheese over a grilled patty, with fresh veggies and signature sauce.

name: Paneer Tikka Burger
description: Grilled paneer tikka with onions, lettuce, and mint mayo in a toasted bun.

description: A flavorful burger with a spicy veg patty, salsa, lettuce, and cheese.

description: A smoky chicken burger with BBQ sauce, onions, lettuce, and cheese.

name: Corn & Cheese Burger

description: A premium veg patty with lettuce, tomato, onion rings, and cheese.

description: A juicy beef patty stacked with cheese, lettuce, onion, pickles, and special sauce.

name: Mushroom & Cheese Burger
